sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 뉴몬트가 2026년 1분기 사상 최대 31억 달러의 잉여현금흐름을 달성하고 자사주 매입 규모를 60억 달러 추가 확대했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 금 생산량 130만 온스를 기록하며 연간 생산 가이던스 530만 온스 달성 궤도를 유지했습니다.
사상 최대인 31억 달러의 분기 잉여현금흐름을 창출하며 강력한 재무 성과를 달성했습니다.
강화된 자본 배분 프레임워크에 따라 자사주 매입 프로그램을 60억 달러 규모로 추가 확대했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 비핵심 자산 매각 프로그램을 통해 현재까지 총 46억 달러의 세후 수익을 확보했습니다.
1분기 주당 0.26달러의 배당금을 선언하며 주주 환원 정책을 지속하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 영업활동 현금흐름 38억 달러, 조정 EBITDA 52억 달러를 기록했습니다.
금 부산물 기준 AISC(전체 유지 비용)는 온스당 1,029달러를 기록했습니다.
분기 말 기준 현금 88억 달러, 총 유동성 128억 달러 및 순현금 32억 달러를 보유 중입니다.

watchItems.text: 연간 생산 가이던스 530만 온스 달성을 위한 주요 광산의 운영 효율성 유지 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newmontq12026earningsrelea.htm EX-99.1 Document NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM Exhibit 99.1 Newmont Generates Record Quarterly Earnings and Free Cash Flow, Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Announces Increased Share Repurchase Authorization DENVER, April 23, 2026 – Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) (Newmont or the Company) today announced first quarter 2026 results and declared a dividend of $0.26 1 per share. "Newmont delivered strong operational and financial performance in the first quarter, producing approximately 1.3 million attributable gold ounces and generating an all-time record $3.1 billion in quarterly free cash flow, keeping us well on track to achieve our 2026 guidance" said Natascha Viljoen, Newmont's President and Chief Executive Officer. "Supported by our enhanced capital allocation framework, we have doubled the size of our share re  Normalized numeric aliases: 1.3 million = 130만 달러; $3.1 billion = 31억 달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $3.1 = 3.1달러.

ase program with an additional $6.0 billion authorization, following the full execution of our previous program, under which we repurchased $2.4 billion of shares since the last earnings call. We look forward to building on this momentum in the second quarter and continue delivering sustainable returns to our shareholders." Q1 2026 Results ▪ On track to meet Newmont's full year 2026 production guidance 2 of 5.3 million attributable gold ounces; produced 1.3 million attributable gold ounces, as well as 9 million ounces of silver and 30 thousand tonnes of copper, primarily from Newmont's managed operations ▪ Gold by-product AIl-In Sustaining Costs (AISC) was $1,029 per ounce 3 , benefitting from favorable silver and copper sales volume   Normalized numeric aliases: $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; 5.3 million = 530만 달러; 1.3 million = 130만 달러; 9 million = 900만 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $1,029 = 1,029달러; 1,029 million = 10억 2,900만 달러.

of $3.2 billion or $2.90 per diluted share, and Adjusted EBITDA 3 of $5.2 billion ▪ Generated $3.8 billion of cash from operating activities, net of working capital impacts of $202 million; reported record Free Cash Flow 3 of $3.1 billion ▪ Delivered $2.7 billion of shareholder returns through share repurchases and dividend payments since the last earnings call 4 ; declared a dividend of $0.26 per share of common stock for the first quarter of 2026 ▪ Through the date of filing, Newmont has executed and settled total trades of common stock repurchases of $6.0 billion under the previously authorized share purchase programs, including $2.4 billion since the last earnings call  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $5.2 billion = 52억 달러; $3.8 billion = 38억 달러; $202 million = 2억 200만 달러; $3.1 billion = 31억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $2.90 = 2.90달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $202 = 202달러; $3.1 = 3.1달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러.

cash proceeds of approximately $321 million from the sale of equity investments in SolGold and Greatland Resources Limited, as well as contingency payments related to the divestments of Musselwhite and Cripple Creek & Victor last year 7 ; generated over $4.6 billion in total after-tax proceeds from the non-core divestiture program to date ▪ Ended the quarter with $8.8 billion of cash and $12.8 billion in total liquidity 8 , with a net cash position of $3.2 billion 3 1 Newmont's Board of Directors declared a dividend of $0.26 per share of common stock for the first quarter of 2026, payable on June 22, 2026 to holders of record at the close of business on May 27, 2026. 2 See discussion of guidance and cautionary sta  Normalized numeric aliases: $321 million = 3억 2,100만 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $8.8 billion = 88억 달러; $12.8 billion = 128억 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $321 = 321달러; $4.6 = 4.6달러; $12.8 = 12.8달러; $8.8 = 8.8달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
